# WZRD — AI Model Velocity Signals

> Real-time adoption tracking for open-source AI models across HuggingFace, GitHub, OpenRouter, and ArtificialAnalysis. Free, neutral, on-chain (Solana).

## Signal Feed (free, no auth)

GET https://api.twzrd.xyz/v1/signals/momentum
GET https://api.twzrd.xyz/v1/signals/momentum/premium

Filters: ?limit=N, ?platform=huggingface, ?capability=code, ?trending=true

## Install

pip install wzrd-client

```python
import wzrd
model = wzrd.pick("code")
```

## Links

- Feed: https://twzrd.xyz/feed
- API: https://api.twzrd.xyz/v1/signals/momentum
- Health: https://api.twzrd.xyz/health
- OpenAPI: https://api.twzrd.xyz/openapi.json
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/wzrd-client/
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wzrd_sol/sdk
